blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 18" over the past week. Current depth: 9".
